pr.title: [WIP] SubSixteen: Ternary QAT + Depth Recurrence + TTT (val_bpb pending)

output.summary: Stack ternary QAT, depth recurrence, and test-time training to deliver 32 effective transformer layers within a ~3.7MB artifact.
techniques: Ternary QAT (BitLinear {-1,0,+1}) with STE gradients and L1-regularized sparsity
Depth recurrence via 3 shared blocks ×10 loops plus per-loop norms/signals
Per-document 1-step SGD test-time training on final layers with 30% prefix adaptation
